info.name: E-Library — AI Recommendations
info.description:
All AI Recommendation endpoints for Norton University E-Library.

Base URL: http://localhost:5005

For authenticated routes, set the `{{token}}` variable to your Bearer token.

query.description: The book category/genre to recommend from

request.description:
Get AI-recommended books for a given category.

Returns up to 6 books from the library that match the category, with AI-generated reasons.

Response source:
- `library` → books matched from the DB
- `ai-general` → AI suggestion (no DB match found)
- `cached: true` → served from 5-min cache (no Gemini call made)

response.name: 200 — Success (library source)

query.description: Title of a book the user liked — returns similar books

request.description:
Get books similar to the given title.

Finds the book in the DB, looks at its category, then asks Gemini to pick the 5 most similar books from the same category.

response.name: 200 — Success

query.description: Always use 'current' — the actual user ID is read from the JWT

request.description:
Get personalised recommendations based on the authenticated user's download/reading history.

Requires a valid Bearer token.

If the user has no history, returns the 6 most popular (most-viewed) books instead.

response.name: 200 — With history
200 — No history (popular fallback)

request.description:
Get trending books based on the most downloads in the last 30 days and overall most views.

Gemini generates a one-sentence reason why each book is trending.

Cached for 5 minutes.

response.name: 200 — Success

variable.description: The database ID of the book to find similar books for

request.description:
Get similar books to a specific book using its database ID.

Looks up the book title from the DB, then runs the same logic as `?bookTitle=...`.

Get personalised recommendations by providing your own data.

All three fields are optional, but at least one must be present:
- `readingHistory` — list of books the user has already read
- `categoryIds` — array of category IDs to narrow results
- `bookId` — a specific book to use as reference

Books already in `readingHistory` are excluded from recommendations.

response.name: 200 — Success
400 — Validation Error

request.description:
Conversational AI librarian assistant.

Ask any book-related, reading, academic, or library question.

Fields:
- `message` (required) — The student's question. Max 500 characters.
- `context.currentBook` (optional) — The book the student is currently viewing
- `context.currentCategory` (optional) — The category the student is currently browsing

The AI knows the total number of books in the library and the available categories.

response.name: 200 — AI Reply
400 — Message Too Long

request.description: Calling without any query params returns a 400 with usage instructions.

response.name: 400 — No params
